connections.note: Visual memory enables self-sufficient face-consistent generation without external photo folders
connections.when: Extending AI character reference generation with visual memory
connections.yields: AI character reference generation extended capabilities

connections.note: Age progression requires consistent reference — visual memory provides portable self-contained refs
connections.when: Extending character aging progression with visual memory

connections.note: Photo preparation (resize, optimize, convert) depends on image manipulation tools
connections.when: visual memory depends on image handling
connections.yields: image handling required patterns and guidance

connections.note: Audio memory pattern stores voice samples for TTS cloning alongside visual references
connections.when: Combining visual memory with text to speech

connections.note: Brand visual identity can be captured as visual memory for consistent generation across projects
connections.when: Combining visual memory with brand asset management

connections.note: Reference photos of real people are PII — visual-memory.json must be excluded from public distribution and scanned before publishing
connections.when: visual memory depends on distribution security
connections.yields: distribution security required patterns and guidance

inhibit: generic image generation without likeness requirement
